backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages solar customer leads stored in a Map, exposing methods to submit, delete, retrieve, and list leads sorted by name. Includes a MixinStorage mixin for blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the Odisha subsidy structure update task to the OdishaGuide component and translations file, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, theme, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the TRI-GITA SERVICES React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Header, Hero, OdishaGuide, forms, footer, etc.) wrapped in a LanguageProvider context.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy section banner promoting bank financing options, featuring scroll-triggered visibility, shimmer animation, gold stat cards with icons, and a WhatsApp CTA link.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right floating WhatsApp button with a navy tooltip, green button, and pulse ring animation linking to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy-900 background displaying brand identity, contact details (phone, email, address), WhatsApp link, and service area information using translated strings.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, desktop/mobile nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a 'Get Quote' CTA button. Uses LanguageContext and i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, gradient overlays, translated headline/tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-indicator stats.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Contact/inquiry form with fields for name, phone, email, city, system size, and message; validates required fields and submits data via a pre-filled WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Odisha-specific solar guide section displaying subsidy tier cards (1–3 kW) and rollout phase coverage, with IntersectionObserver-driven fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: PM Surya Ghar scheme information section covering benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process (application → survey → installation → subsidy credit).
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section rendering two image-topped cards for Residential and Commercial solar offerings, each with a feature checklist and a CTA linking to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a warranty section with three styled cards showing 25, 10, and 5-year guarantees using navy/gold/teal accent themes and translated content.
Displays a WhatsApp contact CTA section with a branded card linking to a WhatsApp number using translated text.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with three feature cards using numbered badges, icons, and navy/gold/teal accent colors from translated content.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od') with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Returns a cached ICP backend actor instance (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, clear, identity, and status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitLead method and invalidates the leads query on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains the full multi-language translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections of the application.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage and the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Outfit and Playfair Display fonts, configuring Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defining a deep navy + emerald gold theme with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, custom navy/gold/teal color palettes, and keyframe animations for banners and shimmer effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom Outfit/Playfair Display fonts, oklch-based navy/gold/teal color palettes, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for TRI-GITA SERVICES tracking schema version, architectural notes on Odisha solar subsidy structure, and a completed fix request to update subsidy values across English/Hindi/Odia translations in the OdishaGuide component.
